english translation text:
SHABBIR YOU MATAM IS IDENTITY OF MOMIN,
DO MATAM OF SHABBIR (a.s.), DO MATAM OF ZAINAB (a.s.)
OUR TEARS ARE GUARANTEE OF OUR SALVATION

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Daagh Nahin Logo, Hai Mojiza Maatam Ka
Sine Pe Likhi Mere, Kerbal Ki Kahani Hai
@HujjatELC
Shabbir Tera Maatam - Shabbir Your Matam
english translation text:
THIS IS NOT A SCAR ON MY CHEST,
IT IS MIRACLE OF MATAM,
OUR HEART HOLDS THE STORY OF KARBALA

urdu transliteration text:
Ghazi Ka Alam Leke, Baazaar Me Aayee Hai
Rudaad Aseeron Ki, Duniya Ko Sunani Hai
@HujjatELC
Shabbir Tera Maatam - Shabbir Your Matam
english translation text:
WE ARE ON THE ROAD WITH THE FLAG OF GHAZI (a.s.),
WE INTEND TO TELL STORY OF PRISONERS TO THE WORLD

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Ne Shuruu Ki Thi, Zindaan Me Azadari
Sadiyon Se Chali Aayi, Yeh Reet Purani Hai
@HujjatELC
Shabbir Tera Maatam - Shabbir Your Matam
english translation text:
ZAINAB (a.s.) STARTED THE AZADARI IN PRISON,
WE WILL CARRY ON THIS TRADITION OF CENTURIES

urdu transliteration text:
Aayi Hai Sadaa Ab Bhi, Karbal Ki Fizaaon Se
Shabbir Haqeeqat Me, Islam Ka Baani Hai
@HujjatELC
Shabbir Tera Maatam - Shabbir Your Matam
english translation text:
EVEN TODAY WE HEAR A VOICE FROM KARBALA,
THAT INDEED SHABBIR IS FOUNDER OF ISLAM

urdu transliteration text:
De Pursaa Bahatar Ka, Zahra Ke Lute Ghar Ka
Har Saal Muharram Me, Yeh Yaad Dilani Hai
@HujjatELC
Shabbir Tera Maatam - Shabbir Your Matam
english translation text:
OFFER CONDOLENCES OF SEVENTY TWO AND OF BIBI ZAHRA’S (a.s.) HOUSEHOLD,
EVERY YEAR IN MUHARRAM WE WILL REMEMBER THIS TRAGEDY
